eightwastelands.configuration.title: eight_wastelands Configs
tooltip.eightwastelands.ironcold_blade.d: When the wind turns cold, the mind grows clearer.
Many words need not be spoken, and many choices become simple.
tooltip.eightwastelands.huoyun_sword.des: A forgotten sword engraved with the character Huo.
tooltip.eightwastelands.fucksky_sword.de: A fabao once wielded by a cultivator from Hegui Cloud Mirror.
tooltip.eightwastelands.blood_drinking_b: Never touch the edge of this blade with your bare hand.
tooltip.eightwastelands.fuckmountain_axe: A young man once used it to split a mountain and save his mother.
tooltip.eightwastelands.test_fabao.descr: A simple test fabao for the first combat pass.
tooltip.eightwastelands.nine_heavens_pun: Tick... blood-red lines spread across the relic.
tooltip.eightwastelands.heavenly_thunder: Nine Thunders Return to the Seal
message.eightwastelands.lou_zhen.no_repa: Lou Zhen: This heavenly artifact does not need repair.
message.eightwastelands.lou_zhen.need_em: Lou Zhen: Repairing a heavenly artifact requires 1 emerald.
message.eightwastelands.lou_zhen.need_le: Lou Zhen: Repairing a heavenly artifact requires %s experience levels.
message.eightwastelands.lou_zhen.repaire: Lou Zhen: The artifact pattern has been restored.
message.eightwastelands.forgetfulness.da: Forgetfulness: You forgot the pain you just suffered.
message.eightwastelands.karma.reversed: Karma reversed: The blood debt is fulfilled and karma falls silent.
message.eightwastelands.bihuo_pearl.brok: Fire-Averting Pearl: Its light has faded and its fire ward is spent.
message.eightwastelands.fengxing_boots.b: Windwalking Boots: Their pattern is spent and the wind is still.
message.eightwastelands.jiehui_ring.save: Ashen Tribulation Ring: Ashes guard your life and leave you one breath.
message.eightwastelands.summer_fan.damag: Summer Fan Guard: This damage was dissolved.
message.eightwastelands.spring_shears.fa: Spring Shears Cut Fate: Half of the target's fate has been severed.
message.eightwastelands.heart_demon.reve: Heart Demon reversed: It is born from the heart and ended by the heart.
message.eightwastelands.heavenly_tribula: Heavenly Tribulation reversed: Nine thunders return to the seal.
message.eightwastelands.earth_disaster.r: Earth Disaster reversed: The earthbound fetters are broken.
message.eightwastelands.withered_blood.r: Withered Blood reversed: Blood and vitality return.
message.eightwastelands.spirit_exhaustio: Spirit Exhaustion reversed: The bell returns spiritual flow.
message.eightwastelands.guiyuan_bell.cle: Guiyuan Bell: Removed one negative effect.
Life Exhaustion reversed: The thread of fate has been cut.
message.eightwastelands.wind_evil.revers: Wind Evil reversed: The gale turns into a guarding breeze.
message.eightwastelands.summer_fan.shiel: Summer Fan Guard: Ready to block the next damage.
message.eightwastelands.luck_deprivation: Luck Deprivation reversed: Heaven no longer claims your harvest.
